results.rendered_html:
anākāśa (3. a + ākāśa) adj.
1〉 finster, verdunkelt: ākāśaṃ tadanākāśaṃ cakrurbhīmā valāhakāḥ  R. 3,29,7 . vgl. 5,64,24 : kṛtvākāśaṃ nirākāśaṃ yantrotkṣiptotpalā [Page1-0182] iva.
— 2〉 ohne Aether  ŚAT. BR. 14,6,8,8 . =  BṚH. ĀR. UP. 3,8,8 .

results.rendered_html:
anākāśa a. [na. ba.]
1 Opaque, not transparent.
2 Having no transparent atmosphere; differing from it.
— śaḥ -śaṃ Not an atmosphere, one undeserving of its name.
